data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the approval workflow requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an approval workflow (supervisor review and approval), but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this functionality exists or is implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for an approval workflow, but lacks specific API endpoints or entities that would allow for validation of this requirement. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence to assert a hard requirement failure.
gaps: No evidence of an approval workflow functionality to confirm supervisor review and approval.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the approval workflow requirement.
